citation: HUD ML 2023-05 Table A row "Term <= 15yr, LTV <= 0.78, <= $726,200"; HUD ML 2013-04 termination rule
comment: Hand-calc: principal=$300k, original_value=$400k -> LTV=0.75 <= 0.78 -> row [term<=180, 0.00<LTV<=0.78, <=$726,200] -> annual_mip_rate=0.0015. UFMIP = $300,000 * 0.0175 = $5,250.00. LTV<=0.90 -> terminates at 132 months.
